titleStmt.title: SII 22.109: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 109. (A.R. No. 109 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE LEFT SIDE OF THE SECOND ENTRANCE. KARIKĀLA CHŌḶA—27th YEAR

summary.p: The last few lines of the inscription are badly damaged. The sense of the record is rather obscure. It seems to register the consecration of a temple of Mahādēva by Vāḷaiyūr-Nakkar Yōgavāṇar a resident of Raṇabhīma-maṅgalam on the southern bank of the Peṇṇai, and an endowment made for worship therein by Vāṇakōvaraiyar Vīraparumar the chief of Vāṇagappāḍi-nāḍu by means of taxation on the lands at that village. The ūravar seem to have been made responsible for the collection and payment of the amount into the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . karikālacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatteḻāvatu vā
ṇakoppāṭi peṇṇait tenkarai Iraṇavima maṅ
kalamuṭaiya vāḷaiyūr nakkar yokavāṇar Eḻuntaruḷuvicca mahā
tevaṟku Innāṭuṭaiya vāṇakovaraiyar viraparumar Eṅkaḷ vaṅ
śattār munpe Ittevaṟku raṇabhima maṅkalam variyiliṭṭu
k kuṭuttārkaḷ nām vāṇakappāṭi nāṭṭai Aḻaittu Ideva
ṟku śrīkāriyamellām ciṟappākat tan=tomenṟu nirvārttatu ja
ṉanātanāṭu śrī kāriyaṅ kaikkoṇṭu ciṟappu vaittapaṭi mun
pu tiruppaṭi māṟṟiraṭṭiyum nan=tāviḷakkiraṭṭiyum maṟṟu
mippaṭi niman=taviraṭṭi vatāka vaittapaṭi Erāṟtara
ppatakku nellum Erāluḻakkeṇṇaiyum Āṇṭu
toṟum Irun=ta Ūravare kuṭavolaippaṭi śrī paṇṭāratte Oṭuk
kuvatākavum raṇabhimamaṅkalattu naṉcey puṉceyk kaṭamaiyu
m maṟṟuḷḷa Āyaṅkaḷum śrī kāriyamellām nāṭu celu
ttuvatākavum śrīkāriyattukku paḻutuceyvārai śi
vadropamum rājadropamum nāṭṭu dropamum ceytār
naṭakkumpaṭi nāṭum māheśvararum ceyyakkaṭa
vatākavum ceṅkolum tiruvaṭi nilaiyu mitto
mum niṟaintu Itu cantirātittavaṟ celvatākat tiru
tu kuṭuttom nāṭṭu vāṇa
The rest is damaged. Four lamp-stands of increasing height and a pair of feet between the third and fourth lamp-stands are cut in relief below the inscription.
Digital edition of SII 22.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
